speaker: seller

args.message: Well hello there! Come to check out our sharp 2017 Nissan Altima SV? You've got great taste! This beauty is packed with features like a power driver's seat, dual-zone climate control, and Bluetooth, all wrapped up in a sleek, fuel-efficient package. It runs like a dream and is priced to move – what are you waiting for?

args.message: Hi there! Thanks, it looks great in the ad. I had a couple of quick questions – has it been in any accidents? And with 104,000 miles, what kind of life expectancy do these Altimas typically have?

text: Hi there! Thanks, it looks great in the ad. I had a couple of quick questions – has it been in any accidents? And with 104,000 miles, what kind of life expectancy do these Altimas typically have?

speaker: seller

args.message: Accidents? Nope, not a single one! This Altima has a clean bill of health. As for the mileage, these Nissan CVTs are known for going the distance, especially with proper maintenance. Honestly, at 104,000 miles, this one's just getting warmed up. We've seen Altimas from this generation easily push past 200,000 miles. This one's been well-cared for.
